title: Ha Giang Loop, Vietnam
html:
Stub. Famous motorbike loop in northern Vietnam; on Yahir's 2022 trip itinerary.

What we know

  • Route candidate in Vietnam prep route notes — listed first.
  • Featured in the trip event log — "Ha Giang Loop" alongside renting motor bike and getting stranded near Hanoi (where Yahir met Vu Van Ba).
